title: Packaging apparatus
abstract: A bagmaking and packaging apparatus includes a film supply unit that conveys a film, a printing unit, a speed detector, and a control unit. The printing unit applies laser light to the film to print the film. The speed detector acquires data relating to the conveyance speed of the film. The control unit links the operation of the printing unit when printing the film to the conveyance speed of the film based on the data from the speed detector.
claims: 1. A packaging apparatus that uses a film to package articles, the packaging apparatus comprising: a conveyance unit that conveys the film; a laser printing device that sweeps light across the film to print the film; a first information acquisition unit that acquires first information indicative of the conveyance speed of the film; and a control unit configured to utilize the first information to control the laser printing device during printing, as the film is being conveyed, based on the conveyance speed of the film, wherein the control unit is configured such that in the case of the conveyance speed of the film changing in the middle of printing the film, the laser printing device changes the manner of printing the film in accordance with the change in the conveyance speed of the film.
